chunks.title: Trust in God Amid Oppression
chunks.reason: The psalmist introduces his distress and declares trust in God despite daily attacks.

chunks.title: God's Care for the Suffering
chunks.reason: The text describes the enemies' schemes and affirms God's intimate record of the psalmist's tears.

chunks.title: Vows and Deliverance
chunks.reason: The psalmist repeats his trust, promises thank offerings, and celebrates God's deliverance from death.
